title: sorghastrum crassum
intro: Sorghastrum crassum, also known as big bluestem, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sorghastrum crassum include its potential to help manage cardiovascular disease, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sorghastrum crassum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential uses.
